scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout. Dark-complexioned Latino male dishwasher (image2) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script stands at the sink with one earbud in, nodding along slowly, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who stands nearby facing him. Fluorescent kitchen lighting.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner kitchen matching image1 layout. Dark-complexioned Latino male dishwasher (image2) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script bobs his head gently while loading plates into the rack, earbud cord swinging, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who leans against the prep table facing him. Warm kitchen morning light.
